SELEE-LIANG_ZI_DIE_JIA_POWER.title: Quantum Superposition
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_DIE_JIA_POWER.description: Block gained from cards +1. Decreases by 1 at end of turn.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_DIE_JIA_POWER.smartDescri: Block gained from cards increased by [blue]{block_add:diff()}[/blue]. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns remaining.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_TAN_SUO_POWER.title: Quantum Collapse
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_TAN_SUO_POWER.description: Damage taken increased by 25%, damage dealt reduced by 25%. Decreases by 1 at end of turn.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_TAN_SUO_POWER.smartDescri: Damage taken increased by 25%, damage dealt reduced by 25%. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns remaining.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_BU_QUE_DING_XING_POWER.de: While having Quantum Superposition, block gained from cards is additionally increased by 3.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_BU_QUE_DING_XING_POWER.sm: While having Quantum Superposition, block gained from cards is additionally increased by [blue]{block_bonus:diff()}[/blue].
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_QU_TI_POWER.title: Quantum Body
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_QU_TI_POWER.description: When Superposition effect triggers, gain 4 Block.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_XING_TAI_POWER.title: Quantum Form
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_XING_TAI_POWER.descriptio:
At the start of your turn, gain {DieJiaPower} [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
The first time [gold]Superposition[/gold] effect triggers each turn, draw {Cards} cards.
SELEE-LIANG_ZI_XING_TAI_POWER.smartDescr:
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{DieJiaPower:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold].
The first time [gold]Superposition[/gold] effect triggers each turn, draw [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] cards.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_NENG_JI_POWER.title: Ring Energy Level
SELEE-XING_HUAN_NENG_JI_POWER.descriptio: Charging progress for Ring Burst. At 100 stacks, enter Ring Burst state.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_NENG_JI_POWER.smartDescr: Charging progress for Ring Burst. At [blue]{Threshold:diff()}[/blue] stacks, enter Ring Burst state. Current: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
SELEE-XING_HUAN_BAO_FA_POWER.title: Ring Burst
SELEE-XING_HUAN_BAO_FA_POWER.description: Currently in Ring Burst state, lasts 2 turns. Gain 6 Degeneracy Kinetic on entry, 4 on reapply. When duration ends, remove Degeneracy Kinetic.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_BAO_FA_POWER.smartDescri: Ring Burst state, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns remaining. Gain [blue]{InitialDongNeng:diff()}[/blue] Degeneracy Kinetic on entry, [blue]{StackDongNeng:diff()}[/blue] on reapply. Removes Degeneracy Kinetic when duration ends.
SELEE-JIAN_BING_DONG_NENG_POWER.title: Degeneracy Kinetic
SELEE-JIAN_BING_DONG_NENG_POWER.descript: Next attacks deal 100% more damage. Decreases by 1 after playing an attack card.
SELEE-JIAN_BING_DONG_NENG_POWER.smartDes: Next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] attacks deal 100% more damage. Decreases by 1 after playing an attack card.
SELEE-LING_YU_MU_XIN_POWER.title: Spirit Plume
SELEE-LING_YU_MU_XIN_POWER.description: Each time you play an Attack card, gain 10 Ring Energy Level. Can trigger 4 times.
SELEE-LING_YU_MU_XIN_POWER.smartDescript: Each time you play an Attack card, gain [blue]{XingHuanNengJi:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold]. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] triggers remaining.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_YING_YU_POWER.title: Ring Surplus
SELEE-XING_HUAN_YING_YU_POWER.descriptio: When entering Ring Burst state, gain 20 Ring Energy Level. Does not trigger when already in Ring Burst state.
SELEE-XING_HUAN_YING_YU_POWER.smartDescr: When entering [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold]. Does not trigger when already in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state.
SELEE-SHI_ZHONG_RU_YI_POWER.title: Unwavering
SELEE-SHEN_HAI_DE_HUAN_MENG_POWER.title: Abyssal Phantasm
SELEE-SHEN_HAI_DE_HUAN_MENG_POWER.descri: When a Resonance attack is triggered, deal 6 damage to all enemies.
SELEE-SHEN_HAI_DE_HUAN_MENG_POWER.smartD: When a [gold]Resonance[/gold] attack is triggered, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to all enemies.
SELEE-YU_HE_POWER.title: Heal
SELEE-YU_HE_POWER.description: When you lose HP during your turn, lose an equal amount of Heal stacks to restore HP.
SELEE-YU_HE_POWER.smartDescription:
When you lose HP during your turn, lose an equal amount of Heal stacks to restore HP.
Current stacks: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
SELEE-BAI_HUA_LING_YU_POWER.title: White Flower Domain
SELEE-BAI_HUA_LING_YU_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose {Amount} HP and gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
SELEE-BAI_HUA_LING_YU_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP and gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] energy.
SELEE-ZHUA_BU_YA_YA_POWER.title: Strength Drain
SELEE-ZHUA_BU_YA_YA_POWER.description: Lose {Amount} Strength this turn. Recovers at end of turn.
SELEE-ZHUA_BU_YA_YA_POWER.smartDescripti: Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Strength this turn. Recovers at end of turn.
SELEE-XIAO_GE_LU_YING_POWER.title: Dawn Song, Dew Shadow
SELEE-XIAO_GE_LU_YING_POWER.description: When attacked this turn, the applier gains {Amount} Heal.
SELEE-XIAO_GE_LU_YING_POWER.smartDescrip: When attacked this turn, the applier gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Heal[/gold].
SELEE-REN_SHU_POWER.title: Benevolent Art
SELEE-REN_SHU_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, Exhaust a card from your draw pile, gain {Amount} Heal. If the exhausted card is a Status or Curse, double the Heal gained.
SELEE-REN_SHU_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, Exhaust a card from your draw pile, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Heal[/gold]. If the exhausted card is a Status or Curse, double the [gold]Heal[/gold] gained.
SELEE-FEN_YANG_FENG_LING_DE_YAO_YUE_POWE: When entering Ring Burst state, gain 2 Energy and draw 2 cards.
When entering [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain [blue]{Energy:diff()}[/blue] Energy and draw [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] cards.
SELEE-QI_QUAN_SUI_HAI_POWER.title: Seven Fists Shatter the Sea
SELEE-QI_QUAN_SUI_HAI_POWER.description: Next 7 Attack cards deal +3 damage. The 7th Attack card deals an additional +10 damage.
SELEE-QI_QUAN_SUI_HAI_POWER.smartDescrip: Next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Attack cards deal +[blue]{DamageAdd:diff()}[/blue] damage. The 7th Attack card deals an additional +[blue]{LastDamageAdd:diff()}[/blue] damage.
SELEE-BAI_HUA_YU_XUE_POWER.title: White Flower Blood
SELEE-BAI_HUA_YU_XUE_POWER.description: Each time you lose HP during your turn, gain 2 Block.
SELEE-BAI_HUA_YU_XUE_POWER.smartDescript: Each time you lose HP during your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Amount} Ring Energy Level.
SELEE-CHU_XING_XIN_YA_POWER.title: First Awakening Bud
SELEE-CHU_XING_XIN_YA_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose {Amount} HP.
SELEE-CHU_XING_XIN_YA_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
SELEE-SHEN_FEN_HU_HUAN_POWER.title: Identity Swap
SELEE-SHEN_FEN_HU_HUAN_POWER.description: At the end of this turn, gain Block equal to your Block.
SELEE-SHEN_FEN_HU_HUAN_POWER.smartDescri: At the end of this turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your Block.
At the end of combat, restore {Amount} HP.

SELEE-LIAN_LI_XING_POWER.title: Linked Stars
SELEE-LIAN_LI_XING_POWER.description: When a Resonance attack triggers, gain 1 Block. If in Ring Burst state, gain 2 additional Block.
SELEE-LIAN_LI_XING_POWER.smartDescriptio: When a [gold]Resonance[/gold] attack triggers, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. If in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, gain [blue]{Amount}+1[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
SELEE-TIAN_CHENG_BENG_LUO_ZHI_KE_POWER.d: On death, deal damage equal to max HP to all other enemies.
SELEE-TIAN_CHENG_BENG_LUO_ZHI_KE_POWER.s: On death, deal damage equal to [blue]{Amount}[/blue]x max HP to all other enemies.
SELEE-HENG_CHANG_SHI_YUAN_POWER.title: Eternal Vow
SELEE-HENG_CHANG_SHI_YUAN_POWER.descript: While in Ring Burst state, every 3 Resonance attacks, gain 1 Energy. (X more attacks needed)
SELEE-HENG_CHANG_SHI_YUAN_POWER.smartDes: While in [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state, every 3 [gold]Resonance[/gold] attacks, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more attacks needed.
SELEE-XUE_DING_E_DE_XI_ER_POWER.title: Schrödinger's Seele
SELEE-XUE_DING_E_DE_XI_ER_POWER.descript: Every 4 HP lost, gain 1 Quantum Superposition. (X more HP lost needed)
SELEE-XUE_DING_E_DE_XI_ER_POWER.smartDes: Every 4 HP lost, gain 1 [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold]. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more HP lost needed.
